---
title: "Summary and Reflection"
id: "BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp04"
section_id: "binomial_distribution-se01-sec01"
session_id: "binomial_distribution-se01"
toc: True
---









## Key points

_Summarize the most important concepts covered in this section._

## Main takeaway

_Provide one clear, overarching message for the learner to remember._

## Before you move on

_Outline any pre-requisites or self-checks needed before starting the next section._

---

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="BINOMIAL_DISTRIBUTION-se01-sec01-sp03.qmd">

            <span class="nav-title">Practice Activity</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
